name: Titan - Vital Monitoring System
description: Developed a modern web-based application for monitoring vital signs
Built scalable REST APIs using .NET Core
Designed responsive UI using Angular with state management (NgRx)
Improved performance using lazy loading and optimized data flow

name: Log Analyzer Tool
description: Built a tool to analyze logs from medical devices
Ensured no sensitive patient data was exposed
Automated log validation for testing workflows

name: Log Mapper Tool
description: Created a GUI tool to extract and map data from PDF files
Integrated APIs to automate testing workflows
Improved efficiency of manual testing processes
